Engineering-led software from Sydney

Enterprise software, cloud automation,
and operational tooling.

RePass Cloud builds production-grade platforms, cloud infrastructure tools, and enterprise automation for organisations that need things to actually work.

Get in touch Our work
Enterprise-grade, production-proven
Security-first by design
🇦🇺 Built in Sydney, Australia
What we build

Five core capability areas

Engineering-led software across enterprise platforms, cloud infrastructure, identity automation, and operational tooling.

Enterprise Platform Development

Multi-tenant SaaS, identity integration, commercial licensing, and production-grade platform architecture.

Cloud Infrastructure Tooling

Cost analysis, SSL certificate management, VM automation, and infrastructure tooling across Azure and AWS.

Business Operations & IT Tooling

ServiceNow integration, performance monitoring, Active Directory automation, and operational utilities.

Microsoft 365 & Identity Automation

User onboarding, lifecycle management, cross-system integrations, and governed identity workflows.

PowerShell Automation & Scripting

Enterprise automation modules and scripts across Windows, Azure, Active Directory, and cloud environments.

Security-first Engineering

Every system we build is architected with security, compliance, and audit requirements from day one.

Flagship product

Cinturon360

The operational control layer for organisations that need to manage complexity across customers, partners, and internal teams. Multi-tenant SaaS with Microsoft Entra ID integration, role-based permissions, delegated administration, and full audit logging.

.NET Azure Entra ID Multi-tenant
Visit Cinturon360
Cinturon360
Governed operational workflows · Audit-ready · Multi-tenant
Real-world work

Case studies

Documented engagements showing what we build in practice — from identity automation to multi-cloud FinOps tooling.

Case Study · Enterprise / Retail

Microsoft 365 Identity Automation

Fully automated, rule-driven identity management for ~2,100 employees across multiple brands in AU/NZ. Zero daily manual IT intervention.

Microsoft 365 PowerShell
Case Study · Multi-brand Retail

Finance Workflow Automation

End-to-end petty cash processing automation integrated with Active Directory, Entra ID, and Oracle HCM. Eliminated 4 FTE manual workload.

Entra ID Oracle HCM
Case Study · Enterprise Technology

Multi-Cloud FinOps Tooling

Unified cost visibility across $7M USD/year cloud estate spanning AWS, Azure, and GCP. Savings realisation tracking and governance platform.

AWS Azure GCP
View all case studies
Aethon
Verified employers · Trusted recruiters · AI-backed marketplace
Also from RePass Cloud

Aethon

Hiring intelligence platform connecting verified employers, trusted recruiters, and job seekers in a transparent, AI-backed marketplace. Built with the same engineering rigour as Cinturon360.

.NET Blazor PostgreSQL AI
Visit Aethon
From the blog

Latest posts

All posts
7 March 2026
Why Most Microsoft 365 Identity Automation Fails in Real Environments
Why Microsoft 365 identity automation often breaks down after the demo phase, and what organisations actually need to make access changes reliable, auditable, schedule-aware, and safe in production.
microsoft 365entra ididentity management
6 March 2026
Export Microsoft 365 Mailboxes, Aliases, and Sizes with PowerShell
A practical guide to connecting to Exchange Online via PowerShell and exporting a complete mailbox report including primary addresses, aliases, mailbox types, sizes, and item counts to CSV.
powershellmicrosoft 365exchange online
28 February 2026
We Are Standardizing on AOT for All Console Software
Why Repass Cloud has standardized on Native AOT for all internal CLI and distributed console tooling, covering runtime mechanics, memory behavior, musl considerations, and real-world migration trade-offs.
dotnetaotnativeaot
